basics.name: Minseong Cho
basics.summary: Currently a graduate researcher at Ajou University. My research interests include active matter dynamics, the Leidenfrost effect, and hair frizz dynamics.

topics: Boundary-driven active matter in soft hydrogels
Boundary-driven active matter in soft hydrogels

presentations.name: Leidenfrost-induced active matter dynamics of spherical hydrogels
presentations.event: APS Division of Fluid Dynamics Meeting

presentations.name: Leidenfrost-induced active matter dynamics of spherical hydrogels
Explosive motion of spherical hydrogel via the Leidenfrost effect

awards.description: Awarded for a capstone project. Project: Compliant-mechanism-based knee assistive device for degenerative osteoarthritis prevention.

awards.description: Awarded for a user-centered assistive device concept. Project: Compliant-mechanism-based knee assistive device for older adults.
